creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I cannot reproduce with 0.10 or 0.12.  There are no real details to go on 
here, either.  If the problem still occurs with 0.12.0, recompile 
rhythmbox, and all of its dependencies with debugging symbols, then get 
a backtrace of the crash using gdb.
